MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONERS MANJOAN FOOD SERVICES, INC. AND DIDIER LABBE'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Request For Award Of Attorneys' Fees.

APPEARANCES: Mark S. Burton, Esq. of JB Law Group 786-0207 for respondents & opposing parties (submitting); no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES DENIED. SECTION 29 REQUIRES MEDIATION BEFORE THE PARTIES RESORT TO ARBITRATION OR COURT ACTION. THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO MEDIATION AND THIS PETITION IS PREMATURE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR #4780
